urdu transliteration text: Kabhi Darwaze Pe Aa Aake Satate Hai Humain
english translation text:
Kabhi Darbar Me Peshi Ko Bulate Hai HumainAt times they have summoned us to the court
At times they have tormented us at our doorstep

urdu transliteration text: Mere Yeh Phool Se Bacche Pooch Te Hai Yehi Mujhse
english translation text:
My beautiful children keep asking of me
Kya Khata Ham Se Hui Hai.....O what is our crime?

urdu transliteration text:
Teri Zehra (sa) Pe Musibat Ki Ghadi Hai
Hai Baba .....teri Zehra (sa) Pe Musibat Ki Ghadi Hai
english translation text:
It is the time of calamity upon your Zehra!
O Father! It is the time of calamity upon your Zehra!

urdu transliteration text:
Sharm Aati Hai Bhala Tum Ko Bataun Kaise
Yeh Tamachon Ke Nisha Tum Ko Dikha Un Kaise
english translation text:
I am so embarrassed, O how can I tell you?
How can I show you the bruises from the slaps on my face?

urdu transliteration text:
Tum Na Pehchan Sakon Ge Dekh Kar Mujhse Kahon Ge
Kya Meri Zehra (sa) Yehi Hai.....
english translation text:
You will not be able to recognize me; you will behold and say to me
Is this my Zehra?

urdu transliteration text:
Teri Zehra (sa) Pe Musibat Ki Ghadi Hai
Hai Baba .....teri Zehra (sa) Pe Musibat Ki Ghadi Hai
english translation text:
It is the time of calamity upon your Zehra!
O Father! It is the time of calamity upon your Zehra!

urdu transliteration text:
Yeh Aziat Yeh Khanoshi Nahi Dekhi Jaati
Mujhse Tanahi Ali (as) Ki Nahi Dekhi Jati
english translation text:
This torment, this silence, is unbearable
I cannot bear to see the loneliness of Ali

urdu transliteration text:
Tera Paygam Suna Ne, Haq Wilayat Ka Batane
Zehra (sa) Ghar Ghar Gai Hai.....
english translation text:
To convey your message; to convey the truth of his Wilayat
Zehra has gone from door to door

urdu transliteration text:
Teri Zehra (sa) Pe Musibat Ki Ghadi Hai
Hai Baba .....teri Zehra (sa) Pe Musibat Ki Ghadi Hai
english translation text:
It is the time of calamity upon your Zehra!
O Father! It is the time of calamity upon your Zehra!

urdu transliteration text:
Aap Ke Sog Me Tarikh Na Dekha Gaya Ghar
Aag Darwaze Pe Ummat Ne Laga Di Aakar
english translation text:
Our home was not seen dimmed in grief of your loss
Your nation came to our door and set it ablaze

urdu transliteration text:
Baba Jaan Baad Tumhare Dekhiye Ghar Me Hamare
Raushni Kaise Hui Hai.....
english translation text:
Dear father, look! After you, in our house
How the torch has blazed!

urdu transliteration text:
Teri Zehra (sa) Pe Musibat Ki Ghadi Hai
Hai Baba .....teri Zehra (sa) Pe Musibat Ki Ghadi Hai
english translation text:
It is the time of calamity upon your Zehra!
O Father! It is the time of calamity upon your Zehra!

urdu transliteration text:
Kabre Zehra (sa) Se Takalum Yeh Sada Aati Hai
Kitni Sadion Se Mere Kabr Pe Veerani Hai
english translation text:
O Takallum! From the grave of Zehra arises a voice
For centuries has desolation pervaded upon my grave

urdu transliteration text:
Phool Turbat Pe Chadha Ne Ke Diya Laa Ke Jala Ne
Kya Medine Me Koi Hai
english translation text:
To lay flowers on my headstone, to light a candle…
Is there anyone in Madina?

urdu transliteration text:
Teri Zehra (sa) Pe Musibat Ki Ghadi Hai
Hai Baba .....teri Zehra (sa) Pe Musibat Ki Ghadi Hai
english translation text:
It is the time of calamity upon your Zehra!
O Father! It is the time of calamity upon your Zehra!
